programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: In the past, children's behaviour and parental failures were private, but when your house records everything, moments of disbelief get put on display.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Lyndsay and Leslie undertake a 1950s rambler with a rough exterior. But the home's proximity to a new sewer system triggers a series of problems.

programme.title: Betting On Paradise
programme.desc: With news threatening to derail the entire project, Steph and Luke come up with an emergency plan. But it all hinges on completing the casita suites.

programme.title: Home Town Kickstart
programme.desc: Page Turner, Carmine Sabatella, Mike Pyle and Russell Holmes help make a Louisiana town more welcoming, with a community centre that honours the past.

programme.title: Sin City Rehab
programme.desc: Alison takes on the home of a dear friend and famous chef Antonia Lofaso, and the pressure's on to deliver a spectacular chef's kitchen.

programme.title: Luxe For Less
programme.desc: Michel and his team look to create a classic design fit for a mansion for a couple with a budget as tight as their square footage.

programme.title: Married To Real Estate
programme.desc: Mike and Egypt look to get a family out of their tiny New York City apartment and into the perfect place in Marietta, Georgia.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Chip and Jo merge mid-century modern and Spanish revival design styles with unique tiles and custom metal details in the bathroom and recreation room.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Chip and Jo focus on custom millwork styled to match the home's mid-century modern origins and add a water feature to the courtyard.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Lyndsay and Leslie undertake a 1950s rambler with a rough exterior. But the home's proximity to a new sewer system triggers a series of problems.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After nine years of medical school, a newly qualified doctor and his wife search for their Alabama dream home.

programme.title: Ugliest House In America
programme.desc: A house that looks like a boat, a home with carpet up the walls and a place that looks like a UFO compete for a $150,000 makeover.

programme.title: Betting On Paradise
programme.desc: With news threatening to derail the entire project, Steph and Luke come up with an emergency plan. But it all hinges on completing the casita suites.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: The doorbell camera becomes an interactive tool for comedic communication when friends, neighbours, and strangers talk to the camera.

programme.title: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: In the past, children's behaviour and parental failures were private, but when your house records everything, moments of disbelief get put on display.

programme.title: Sin City Rehab
programme.desc: Alison takes on the home of a dear friend and famous chef Antonia Lofaso, and the pressure's on to deliver a spectacular chef's kitchen.

programme.title: Home Town Kickstart
programme.desc: Page Turner, Carmine Sabatella, Mike Pyle and Russell Holmes help make a Louisiana town more welcoming, with a community centre that honours the past.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An exec at HGTV and his wife look to purchase their first home in New Jersey.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A busy couple is looking for a vacation home. She's thinking about a property for the family, while he's all about making it produce income.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: With their first child on the way, a couple needs to trade their tiny apartment for a long-term home in Vero Beach, Florida.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A California woman decides to embrace the laid-back lifestyle in Playa del Carmen, Mexico.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A Minnesota native has fallen in love with his new town and wants to set down roots in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: David Bromstad helps a Florida couple find their perfect first house in Tallahassee.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple looks to leave bustling Bentonville, Arkansas, for a quieter setting outside of town.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: David Bromstad helps a woman buy her first home in Cape Girardeau, MO, with her $1 million winnings.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt Renovation
programme.desc: A military family that's used to frequently relocating looks for a North Carolina waterfront getaway where the kids can grow up making memories.

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A couple torn between shabby chic and industrial styles asks Jenn to make a plan that will satisfy them both, before their adopted baby arrives!

programme.title: Married To Real Estate
programme.desc: A couple that has inherited a childhood home wants to turn it into a short-term rental property. Egypt and Mike transform it into a dream bungalow.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After years of moving around for his medical training, a young doctor is ready to put down roots in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: Mike and Carmine take a little inspiration from nature and convert a family's home into a California Craftsman with an organic edge.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt Renovation
programme.desc: A military family that's used to frequently relocating looks for a North Carolina waterfront getaway where the kids can grow up making memories.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: A family of seven is ready to fulfil their dream of living on the water on Long Island's Merrick, New York. But finding a place is a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: After living in Seattle, a couple wants a place on the water in Honolulu. Are they both willing to make compromises to find a home they both love?

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation
programme.desc: A Southern California family finds a house large enough to accommodate their growing needs after a few renovations.ÿ.

programme.desc: Page Turner, Carmine Sabatella, Mike Pyle and Russell Holmes help make a Louisiana town more welcoming, with a community centre that honours the past.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: Carmine redesigns a kitchen and bathroom while Mike goes all out on the entire yard, and it makes for a tough decision of which plan to prioritize.

programme.desc: Chip and Jo merge mid-century modern and Spanish revival design styles with unique tiles and custom metal details in the bathroom and recreation room.

programme.desc: Lyndsay and Leslie undertake a 1950s rambler with a rough exterior. But the home's proximity to a new sewer system triggers a series of problems.

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: Jenn updates a couple's '80s rancher with a new kitchen, living room and bathroom using a rustic and industrial design.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: A family of seven is ready to fulfil their dream of living on the water on Long Island's Merrick, New York. But finding a place is a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: After living in Seattle, a couple wants a place on the water in Honolulu. Are they both willing to make compromises to find a home they both love?

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation
programme.desc: A renovation gets bigger when a new homeowner thinks outside the box. His brother may have to step in to make sure he doesn't get in over his head.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt Renovation
programme.desc: A military family that's used to frequently relocating looks for a North Carolina waterfront getaway where the kids can grow up making memories.

programme.desc: Chip and Jo merge mid-century modern and Spanish revival design styles with unique tiles and custom metal details in the bathroom and recreation room.

programme.title: Home Town Kickstart
programme.desc: Page Turner, Carmine Sabatella, Mike Pyle and Russell Holmes help make a Louisiana town more welcoming, with a community centre that honours the past.

programme.title: Building Outside The Lines
programme.desc: Cappie and Alex transform an old shipping container into a surprise sauna. Plus, a request from a beloved teacher leads to a custom fire pit haven.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An Alaskan family moves for a better work-life balance and to give their son the opportunity to play baseball year-round in Melbourne, Australia.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Despite their project manager's numerous concerns, Tarek and Christina take the plunge with an Anaheim, Calif., trust sale property.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Jo finalises the design for a showstopping staircase in the entry as other custom pieces are installed, and Chip works on two big outdoor features.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: To celebrate 10 years of Fixer Upper, Jo plans a big surprise for Chip on reveal day with special guests Tim Tebow and Robert Griffin III.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin face their biggest project yet as they take on an iconic Laurel home with an interior that's on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Lyndsay and Leslie look to turn a 'grandma chic' mid-century rambler from grey and peach into a true retro prize. They use their best tricks to do it.

programme.desc: An Alaskan family moves for a better work-life balance and to give their son the opportunity to play baseball year-round in Melbourne, Australia.

programme.desc: Despite their project manager's numerous concerns, Tarek and Christina take the plunge with an Anaheim, Calif., trust sale property.

programme.desc: An empty nester wants to move on from the suburbs and enjoy single life in downtown Birmingham, Alabama.

programme.desc: A NY couple hopes to find old world charm in Florida with their $7 million lottery winnings.
